; xochitl-translate proof of concept
; Based on the selection-text paths used by:
; - rmitchellscott/xovi-qmd-extensions 3.27/tocFromSelection.qmd
; - ingatellent/xovi-qmd-extensions 3.27/addTagsToContextMenu.qmd
;
; This version adds a Translate action. It passes selected text directly into
; the Local or configured AI backend instead of using a selection handoff file.
; It also starts Bergamot through qt-command-executor and displays the original
; plus translated text in an in-document popup.
; It also adds a toolbar T+cursor button. Pressing that button switches to the
; selection path and writes:
;   /tmp/xochitl-translate-debug.txt

AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    IMPORT [[7082546018834]] 1.0
    TRAVERSE FocusScope
        LOCATE AFTER selectSelection
        INSERT {
            property string xochitlTranslateBackend: "ai"
            signal xochitlTranslateSelectTextRequested
            signal xochitlTranslateSelectTextModeChanged(bool active)
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[7712155293725601]][.[[214634455770]]=`toolbarProvider.editingTools`]
        INSERT {
            PenTool {
                ~&5972374&~: xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect
                objectName: "xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect"
                ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
                pen: ~&6504254477&~.selectionPen
                penToolType: "selection"
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: ""
                ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~
                implicitlySelected: ~&6504254477&~.selectedPen === xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect
                minimumFoldoutWidth: 260

                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    var alreadySelected = xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.selected
                        || xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.implicitlySelected
                        || ~&6504254477&~.selectedPen === xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect;
                    xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.writeDebug("toolbar text-select clicked backend=" + ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateBackend + " alreadySelected=" + alreadySelected);
                    if (alreadySelected) {
                        ~&6504254477&~.requestPenSelect(xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect, Toolbar.SelectMode.Activate);
                        return;
                    }
                    ~&6504254477&~.selectionPen.tool = Line.SelectionTool;
                    ~&6504254477&~.requestPenSelect(xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect, Toolbar.SelectMode.DontActivate);
                    ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateSelectTextModeChanged(true);
                    ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateSelectTextRequested();
                }

                function writeDebug(~&233736549263054&~) {
                    ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                    req.~&6504147419&~("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-debug.txt");
                    req.~&6504279475&~(~&233736549263054&~ + " selected=" + xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.selected + " implicit=" + xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.implicitlySelected);
                }

                content: Item {
                    anchors.fill: parent

                    Text {
                        anchors.centerIn: parent
                        anchors.horizontalCenterOffset: -5
                        text: "T"
                        font.pointSize: 28
                        color: xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.selected || xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.implicitlySelected ? Values.colorWhite : Values.colorBlack
                    }

                    Text {
                        anchors.right: parent.right
                        anchors.rightMargin: 8
                        anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
                        anchors.bottomMargin: 5
                        text: ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateBackend === "local" ? "L" : "A"
                        font.pointSize: 11
                        font.bold: true
                        color: xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.selected || xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.implicitlySelected ? Values.colorWhite : Values.colorBlack
                    }

                    Rectangle {
                        width: 4
                        height: 34
                        anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
                        anchors.horizontalCenter: parent.horizontalCenter
                        anchors.horizontalCenterOffset: 18
                        color: xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.selected || xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.implicitlySelected ? Values.colorWhite : Values.colorBlack
                    }
                }

                foldoutContent: ColumnLayout {
                    spacing: 0

                    ArkControls.FoldoutItem {
                        label: "AI"
                        iconSource: "qrc:/icons/sparkles.svg"
                        selected: ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateBackend === "ai"
                        antialiasing: ~&6504254477&~.antialiasing
                        focusPolicy: Qt.NoFocus
                        Layout.fillWidth: true
                        onClicked: {
                            ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateBackend = "ai";
                            xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.foldout.visible = false;
                            xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.writeDebug("toolbar backend selected ai");
                        }
                    }

                    ArkControls.FoldoutItem {
                        label: "Local"
                        iconSource: "qrc:/ark/icons/list"
                        selected: ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateBackend === "local"
                        antialiasing: ~&6504254477&~.antialiasing
                        focusPolicy: Qt.NoFocus
                        Layout.fillWidth: true
                        onClicked: {
                            ~&6504254477&~.xochitlTranslateBackend = "local";
                            xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.foldout.visible = false;
                            xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect.writeDebug("toolbar backend selected local");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE FocusScope
        LOCATE AFTER selectedPen
        INSERT {
            Connections {
                target: root
                function onSelectedPenChanged() {
                    if (root.selectedPen && root.selectedPen.objectName !== "xochitlTranslateToolbarSelect") {
                        root.selectionPen.tool = Line.SelectionTool;
                        root.xochitlTranslateSelectTextModeChanged(false);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE ?#[[233745975898428]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[14914402724175945141]]
        INSERT {
            onXochitlTranslateSelectTextRequested: {
                var status = "select-tool:";
                try {
                    sceneView.xochitlTranslateDefaultBackend = documentViewTools.xochitlTranslateBackend || "ai";
                    status += " backend=" + sceneView.xochitlTranslateDefaultBackend;
                } catch (eBackend) {
                    status += " no-backend(" + eBackend + ")";
                }
                try {
                    Experimental.glyphSelection.enabled = true;
                    status += " glyphSelection";
                } catch (e0) {
                    status += " no-glyphSelection(" + e0 + ")";
                }
                try {
                    documentViewTools.selectionPen.tool = Line.SelectionTool;
                    status += " selectionPen";
                } catch (e1) {
                    status += " no-selectionPen(" + e1 + ")";
                }
                try {
                    documentViewTools.activeTool = "selection";
                    status += " activeTool";
                } catch (e2) {
                    status += " no-activeTool(" + e2 + ")";
                }
                try {
                    sceneView.endItemSelection();
                    status += " endItemSelection";
                } catch (e3) {
                    status += " no-endItemSelection(" + e3 + ")";
                }
                try {
                    sceneView.endGlyphSelection();
                    status += " endGlyphSelection";
                } catch (e4) {
                    status += " no-endGlyphSelection(" + e4 + ")";
                }
	            try {
	                sceneView.forceActiveFocus();
	                status += " forceActiveFocus";
	            } catch (e5) {
	                status += " no-forceActiveFocus(" + e5 + ")";
		            }
		            try {
		                status = sceneView.xochitlTranslateEnsureSidecarThenSelect(status);
		            } catch (e6) {
		                status += " no-glyphSelectMode(" + e6 + ")";
		            }
	            try {
	                sceneView.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("select-requested", status);
	            } catch (e7) {
	            }

	            var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
	            req.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-debug.txt");
	            req.send(status);
	        }
            onXochitlTranslateSelectTextModeChanged: function(active) {
                try {
                    sceneView.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("mode-changed", "active=" + active);
                    sceneView.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode = active;
                    if (!active) {
                        sceneView.xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect();
                    }
                } catch (e8) {
                }
            }
            onXochitlTranslateBackendChanged: {
                try {
                    sceneView.xochitlTranslateDefaultBackend = documentViewTools.xochitlTranslateBackend || "ai";
                } catch (e9) {
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[3197972396468700595]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233322867]]
	LOCATE BEFORE [[197082485]]
	INSERT {
		signal translateSelection(string backend)
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[214642769434]]
		LOCATE BEFORE [[425121728314878811.16765000136167945189.7081261925573]]#[[3012293087768835154]]
		INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: translateSelectionTranslate
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&6504315758&~: "Translate"
				~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/icons/sparkles.svg"
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.translateSelection("")
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
	IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor [[180922.180921]]
	TRAVERSE FocusScope
	LOCATE AFTER openPage
		INSERT {
			property bool xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode: false
			property var xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage: null
			property string xochitlTranslateTextLayerPageKey: ""
			property var xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRect: Qt.rect(0, 0, 0, 0)
			property bool xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRectValid: false
			property string xochitlTranslateLastStrokeDocumentId: ""
			property int xochitlTranslateLastStrokePage: -1
				property string xochitlTranslateBergamotBin: "/home/root/xovi/bergamot/bergamot"
				property string xochitlTranslateBergamotConfig: "/home/root/xovi/bergamot/enzh/config.yml"
				property string xochitlTranslateSidecarBin: "/home/root/rmkit-cn/bin/text-layer-sidecar"
				property string xochitlTranslateTextLayerEnabledFile: "file:///home/root/rmkit-cn/text-layer-sidecar.enabled"
				property string xochitlTranslateCommandStdout: ""
				property string xochitlTranslateCommandStderr: ""
				property string xochitlTranslateSidecarStdout: ""
				property string xochitlTranslateSidecarStderr: ""
				property bool xochitlTranslateSidecarPendingSelect: false
				property bool xochitlTranslatePopupVisible: false
				property bool xochitlTranslateBusy: false
			property string xochitlTranslateOriginalText: ""
			property string xochitlTranslateTranslatedText: ""
			property string xochitlTranslateStatusText: ""
			property string xochitlTranslateCjkFont: "Noto Sans CJK SC"
			property string xochitlTranslateDefaultBackend: "ai"
			property string xochitlTranslateActiveBackend: "ai"
			property var xochitlTranslateAiXhr: null
			property string xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText: ""
			property int xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceSeq: 0
			property string xochitlTranslateFollowupText: ""
			property bool xochitlTranslateShowOriginalText: true

			AsyncCommandExecutor {
				id: xochitlTranslateBergamotExecutor
			onStdOutAvailable: function(output) {
				root.xochitlTranslateCommandStdout += output + "\n";
			}
			onStdErrAvailable: function(errors) {
				root.xochitlTranslateCommandStderr += errors + "\n";
			}
			onRunningChanged: {
				if (!running && root.xochitlTranslateBusy && root.xochitlTranslateActiveBackend === "local") {
					root.xochitlTranslateCommandFinished(exitCode);
				}
				}
			}

			AsyncCommandExecutor {
				id: xochitlTranslateSidecarExecutor
				onStdOutAvailable: function(output) {
					root.xochitlTranslateSidecarStdout += output + "\n";
				}
				onStdErrAvailable: function(errors) {
					root.xochitlTranslateSidecarStderr += errors + "\n";
				}
				onRunningChanged: {
					if (!running) {
						root.xochitlTranslateSidecarFinished(exitCode);
					}
				}
			}

			Timer {
				id: xochitlTranslateSelectionFailTimer
				interval: 250
				repeat: false
				onTriggered: root.xochitlTranslateExitFailedSelection("timer")
			}

			function xochitlTranslateDebug(path, message) {
				try {
					var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					req.open("PUT", path);
					req.send(message);
				} catch (e) {
				}
			}

			function xochitlTranslateStartSelectionFailTimer(reason) {
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("selection-invalid-wait", "reason=" + reason);
				xochitlTranslateSelectionFailTimer.restart();
			}

			function xochitlTranslateCancelSelectionFailTimer(reason) {
				if (xochitlTranslateSelectionFailTimer.running) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("selection-invalid-cancel", "reason=" + reason);
				}
				xochitlTranslateSelectionFailTimer.stop();
			}

			function xochitlTranslateExitFailedSelection(reason) {
				if (!xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode || !xochitlTranslateHasCurrentStrokeRect()) {
					return;
				}
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("selection-failed-exit", "reason=" + reason);
				xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode = false;
				xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect();
				try {
					endItemSelection();
				} catch (e1) {
				}
				try {
					endGlyphSelection();
				} catch (e2) {
				}
				try {
					strokeHandler.setSelectionActive(false);
				} catch (e3) {
				}
				try {
					inputSurface.clearFramebuffer();
				} catch (e4) {
				}
				try {
					viewport.requestRepaintDirty();
				} catch (e5) {
				}
				xochitlTranslateSetPopup("", "", "No text selected.", false, false);
			}

		function xochitlTranslateTraceSelection(event, detail) {
			var documentId = "no-doc";
			var pageIndex = -1;
			try {
				if (root.document && root.document.id) documentId = root.document.id;
				pageIndex = root.page;
			} catch (e0) {
			}
			++xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceSeq;
			var line = xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceSeq + " " + Date.now()
				+ " " + event
				+ " doc=" + documentId
				+ " page=" + pageIndex
				+ " mode=" + xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode
				+ " lastValid=" + xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRectValid
				+ " lastRect=" + xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRect
				+ " busy=" + xochitlTranslateBusy
				+ " detail=" + (detail || "");
			xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText += line + "\n";
			if (xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText.length > 24000) {
				xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText = xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText.slice(xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText.length - 24000);
			}
			xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-selection-trace.txt", xochitlTranslateSelectionTraceText);
		}

			function xochitlTranslateClosePopup() {
				try {
					if (xochitlTranslateAiXhr) {
						xochitlTranslateAiXhr.abort();
					}
				} catch (e0) {
				}
				xochitlTranslateAiXhr = null;
				xochitlTranslatePopupVisible = false;
				xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
			}

			function xochitlTranslateSetPopup(original, translated, statusText, busy, showOriginal) {
				xochitlTranslateOriginalText = original || "";
				xochitlTranslateTranslatedText = translated || "";
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = statusText || "";
				xochitlTranslateBusy = busy;
				xochitlTranslateFollowupText = "";
				xochitlTranslateShowOriginalText = showOriginal === false ? false : xochitlTranslateOriginalText.length > 0;
				xochitlTranslatePopupVisible = true;
			}

		function xochitlTranslateShellQuote(value) {
			return "'" + String(value).replace(/'/g, "'\"'\"'") + "'";
		}

		function xochitlTranslateBergamotCommand() {
			return "printf '%s\\n' \"$XOCHITL_TRANSLATE_TEXT\" | "
				+ xochitlTranslateShellQuote(xochitlTranslateBergamotBin)
				+ " --model-config-paths "
				+ xochitlTranslateShellQuote(xochitlTranslateBergamotConfig)
				+ " --log-level off";
		}

		function xochitlTranslateCurrentDocumentId() {
			if (root.document && root.document.id) {
				return root.document.id;
			}
			return "";
		}

		function xochitlTranslateDocumentBasePath() {
			var documentId = xochitlTranslateCurrentDocumentId();
			if (documentId.length === 0) {
				return "";
			}
			return "/home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + documentId;
		}

		function xochitlTranslateDocumentFileType() {
			var basePath = xochitlTranslateDocumentBasePath();
			if (basePath.length === 0) {
				return "";
			}
			try {
				var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
				req.open("GET", "file://" + basePath + ".content", false);
				req.send();
				if (req.status === 0 || req.status === 200) {
					var content = JSON.parse(req.responseText || "{}");
					return String(content.fileType || "").toLowerCase();
				}
			} catch (e) {
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("document-type-error", "error=" + e);
			}
			return "";
		}

		function xochitlTranslateDocumentFilePath() {
			var basePath = xochitlTranslateDocumentBasePath();
			if (basePath.length === 0) {
				return "";
			}
			var fileType = xochitlTranslateDocumentFileType();
			if (fileType.length > 0) {
				return basePath + "." + fileType;
			}
			return basePath;
		}

			function xochitlTranslateTextLayerPageFile() {
				return "file:///home/root/xovi/translate-text-layer/"
					+ xochitlTranslateCurrentDocumentId() + "/" + root.page + ".json";
			}

			function xochitlTranslateHasTextLayerSidecar() {
				if (!root.document || !root.document.id || root.page < 0) {
					return false;
				}
				try {
					var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					req.open("GET", xochitlTranslateTextLayerPageFile(), false);
					req.send();
					return (req.status === 0 || req.status === 200)
						&& (req.responseText || "").length > 0;
				} catch (e) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-check-error", "error=" + e);
					return false;
				}
			}

			function xochitlTranslateShouldBuildTextLayerSidecar() {
				if (xochitlTranslateDocumentFileType() !== "pdf") {
					return false;
				}
				try {
					var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					req.open("GET", xochitlTranslateTextLayerEnabledFile, false);
					req.send();
					if (req.status !== 0 && req.status !== 200) {
						return false;
					}
				} catch (e) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-disabled", "error=" + e);
					return false;
				}
				return !xochitlTranslateHasTextLayerSidecar();
			}

			function xochitlTranslateEnsureSidecarThenSelect(status) {
				if (!xochitlTranslateShouldBuildTextLayerSidecar()) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-ready", "status=" + status);
					xochitlTranslateSelectText();
					return status + " glyphSelectMode";
				}
				xochitlTranslateSidecarPendingSelect = true;
				xochitlTranslateSetPopup("", "", "Preparing PDF text layer...", true, false);
				if (xochitlTranslateSidecarExecutor.running) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-already-running", "status=" + status);
					return status + " sidecarAlreadyRunning";
				}
				xochitlTranslateSidecarStdout = "";
				xochitlTranslateSidecarStderr = "";
				try {
					xochitlTranslateSidecarExecutor.command = xochitlTranslateSidecarBin;
					xochitlTranslateSidecarExecutor.arguments = [
						"-doc-id", xochitlTranslateCurrentDocumentId(),
						"-pdftotext", "/home/root/rmkit-cn/bin/pdftotext"
					];
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-start",
						"command=" + xochitlTranslateSidecarBin + " doc=" + xochitlTranslateCurrentDocumentId());
					if (!xochitlTranslateSidecarExecutor.startCommand(3000)) {
						xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-start-failed", "");
						xochitlTranslateSidecarPendingSelect = false;
						xochitlTranslatePopupVisible = false;
						xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
						xochitlTranslateSelectText();
						return status + " sidecarStartFailed glyphSelectMode";
					}
					return status + " sidecarStarted";
				} catch (e) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-start-error", "error=" + e);
					xochitlTranslateSidecarPendingSelect = false;
					xochitlTranslatePopupVisible = false;
					xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
					xochitlTranslateSelectText();
					return status + " sidecarStartError(" + e + ") glyphSelectMode";
				}
			}

			function xochitlTranslateSidecarFinished(exitCode) {
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sidecar-finished",
					"exit=" + exitCode
					+ " ready=" + xochitlTranslateHasTextLayerSidecar()
					+ " stdout=" + xochitlTranslateSidecarStdout.slice(0, 160)
					+ " stderr=" + xochitlTranslateSidecarStderr.slice(0, 240));
				xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sidecar-debug.txt",
					"exit=" + exitCode
					+ "\nstdout=" + xochitlTranslateSidecarStdout
					+ "\nstderr=" + xochitlTranslateSidecarStderr);
				if (!xochitlTranslateSidecarPendingSelect) {
					return;
				}
				xochitlTranslateSidecarPendingSelect = false;
				xochitlTranslatePopupVisible = false;
				xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
				xochitlTranslateSelectText();
			}

		function xochitlTranslateBuildTranslatePrompt(sentence) {
			var prompt = "请帮我翻译这句话为中文:" + sentence
				+ ", 以及分解句子结构,以及显示英语非常用单词(不属于8000常用词)意思,用词根记忆法帮我记忆."
				+ "不要使用Markdown,只输出简化纯文本,严格使用这个格式:"
				+ "\n译文:..."
				+ "\n句子结构:..."
					+ "\n不常用单词:\n1.xxx"
				+ "\n2.yyy";
			return prompt;
		}

		function xochitlTranslateBuildFollowupPrompt(question) {
			var prompt = "请基于以下原文和上一轮回答，回答追问。不要使用Markdown，只输出简化纯文本。";
			if (xochitlTranslateOriginalText.length > 0) {
				prompt += "\n\n原文:\n" + xochitlTranslateOriginalText;
			}
			if (xochitlTranslateTranslatedText.length > 0) {
				prompt += "\n\n上一轮回答:\n" + xochitlTranslateTranslatedText;
			}
			prompt += "\n\n追问:\n" + question;
			return prompt;
		}

		function xochitlTranslateStartLocal(cleanText) {
			xochitlTranslateActiveBackend = "local";
			xochitlTranslateSetPopup(cleanText, "", "Translating...", true);
			xochitlTranslateCommandStdout = "";
			xochitlTranslateCommandStderr = "";
			try {
				xochitlTranslateBergamotExecutor.command = "/bin/sh";
				xochitlTranslateBergamotExecutor.arguments = ["-c", xochitlTranslateBergamotCommand()];
				xochitlTranslateBergamotExecutor.environment = {
					"XOCHITL_TRANSLATE_TEXT": cleanText
				};
				if (!xochitlTranslateBergamotExecutor.startCommand(3000)) {
					xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
					xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Translate failed: bergamot did not start.";
				}
			} catch (e) {
				xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Translate failed: " + e;
				xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-command-debug.txt",
					"start error=" + e);
			}
		}

		function xochitlTranslateStartAI(prompt, originalText, statusText, showOriginal) {
			xochitlTranslateActiveBackend = "ai";
			xochitlTranslateSetPopup(originalText || "", "", statusText || "AI...", true, showOriginal);
			xochitlTranslateTranslatedText = "";
			xochitlTranslateCommandStdout = "";
			xochitlTranslateCommandStderr = "";
			try {
				if (xochitlTranslateAiXhr) {
					xochitlTranslateAiXhr.abort();
				}
			} catch (e0) {
			}
			var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
			xochitlTranslateAiXhr = xhr;
			var lastLen = 0;
			var tail = "";
			xhr.open("POST", "http://127.0.0.1:8080/ai-page-chat");
			xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
			xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
				var rs = xhr.readyState;
				if (rs !== XMLHttpRequest.LOADING && rs !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
					return;
				}
				var chunk = xhr.responseText.substring(lastLen);
				lastLen = xhr.responseText.length;
				var lines = (tail + chunk).split("\n");
				if (rs === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
					tail = "";
				} else {
					tail = lines.pop();
				}
				for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
					var line = lines[i].replace(/\r$/, "");
					if (line.length === 0) {
						continue;
					}
					var d;
					try {
						d = JSON.parse(line);
					} catch (e1) {
						continue;
					}
					if (typeof d.text === "string" && d.text.length > 0) {
						xochitlTranslateTranslatedText += d.text;
						xochitlTranslateStatusText = "";
					} else if (d.error) {
						xochitlTranslateStatusText = "AI failed: " + d.error;
					}
				}
				if (rs === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
					xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
					xochitlTranslateAiXhr = null;
					if (xhr.status !== 200 && xochitlTranslateTranslatedText.length === 0) {
						xochitlTranslateStatusText = "AI failed: HTTP " + xhr.status;
					} else if (xochitlTranslateTranslatedText.length === 0 && xochitlTranslateStatusText.length === 0) {
						xochitlTranslateStatusText = "AI failed: empty output.";
					}
				}
			}
			xhr.onerror = function() {
				xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
				xochitlTranslateAiXhr = null;
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "AI failed: network error.";
			}
			xhr.send(JSON.stringify({
				prompt: prompt,
				document_id: xochitlTranslateCurrentDocumentId(),
				document_path: xochitlTranslateDocumentFilePath()
			}));
		}

		function xochitlTranslateSubmitFollowup() {
			var question = (xochitlTranslateFollowupText || "").replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
			if (question.length === 0) {
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Enter a question.";
				return;
			}
			if (xochitlTranslateActiveBackend !== "ai") {
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Ask is only available for AI.";
				return;
			}
			var prompt = xochitlTranslateBuildFollowupPrompt(question);
			xochitlTranslateFollowupText = "";
			xochitlTranslateShowOriginalText = false;
			xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-command-debug.txt",
				"ai ask question=" + question.slice(0, 240));
			xochitlTranslateStartAI(prompt, xochitlTranslateOriginalText, "AI...", false);
		}

		function xochitlTranslateCommandFinished(exitCode) {
			xochitlTranslateBusy = false;
			var translated = xochitlTranslateCommandStdout.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
			var errors = xochitlTranslateCommandStderr.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
			if (exitCode === 0 && translated.length > 0) {
				xochitlTranslateTranslatedText = translated;
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "";
				return;
			}
			if (exitCode === 0) {
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Translate failed: empty output.";
			} else {
				xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Translate failed: exit " + exitCode;
			}
			xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-command-debug.txt",
				"exit=" + exitCode
				+ " stdout=" + translated.slice(0, 240)
				+ " stderr=" + errors.slice(0, 240));
		}

		function xochitlTranslateText(text, backend) {
			var cleanText = (text || "").replace(/\n/g, " ").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
			if (cleanText.length === 0) {
				xochitlTranslateSetPopup("", "", "No text selected.", false);
				return;
			}
			if (xochitlTranslateBergamotExecutor.running) {
				if (xochitlTranslatePopupVisible) {
					xochitlTranslateStatusText = "Translate is already running.";
				} else {
					xochitlTranslateSetPopup(cleanText, "", "Translate is already running.", false);
				}
				return;
			}
			var selectedBackend = backend || xochitlTranslateDefaultBackend;
			if (selectedBackend === "local") {
				xochitlTranslateStartLocal(cleanText);
				return;
			}
			var freshThreadPrompt = xochitlTranslateBuildTranslatePrompt(cleanText);
			xochitlTranslateStartAI(freshThreadPrompt, cleanText, "AI...", true);
		}

				function xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect() {
					xochitlTranslateCancelSelectionFailTimer("reset");
					if (xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRectValid || xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode) {
						xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("reset-last-stroke", "");
					}
				xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRectValid = false;
				xochitlTranslateLastStrokeDocumentId = "";
				xochitlTranslateLastStrokePage = -1;
			}

			function xochitlTranslateHasCurrentStrokeRect() {
				return xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRectValid
					&& root.document
					&& xochitlTranslateLastStrokeDocumentId === root.document.id
					&& xochitlTranslateLastStrokePage === root.page;
			}

			function xochitlTranslateLoadTextLayerPage() {
				if (!root.document || !root.document.id || root.page < 0) {
					return null;
				}
				var pageKey = root.document.id + ":" + root.page;
				if (xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage && xochitlTranslateTextLayerPageKey === pageKey) {
					return xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage;
				}
				xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage = null;
				xochitlTranslateTextLayerPageKey = pageKey;
				try {
					var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					req.open("GET", "file:///home/root/xovi/translate-text-layer/" + root.document.id + "/" + root.page + ".json", false);
					req.send();
					if (req.status !== 0 && req.status !== 200) {
						xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("text-layer-missing",
							"status=" + req.status + " urlDoc=" + root.document.id + " bytes=" + req.responseText.length);
						xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
							"textLayer missing doc=" + root.document.id + " page=" + root.page + " status=" + req.status);
						return null;
					}
					if (req.responseText.length === 0) {
						xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("text-layer-empty",
							"status=" + req.status + " urlDoc=" + root.document.id);
						xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
							"textLayer empty doc=" + root.document.id + " page=" + root.page + " status=" + req.status);
						return null;
					}
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("text-layer-loaded",
						"status=" + req.status + " bytes=" + req.responseText.length
						+ " head=" + req.responseText.slice(0, 80).replace(/\n/g, " "));
					xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage = JSON.parse(req.responseText);
					if (xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage && xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage.page) {
						xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage = xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage.page;
					}
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("text-layer-parsed",
						"sentences=" + (xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage.sentences ? xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage.sentences.length : 0)
						+ " width=" + xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage.width
						+ " height=" + xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage.height);
					return xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage;
				} catch (e) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("text-layer-error",
						"error=" + e + " bytes=" + (req && req.responseText ? req.responseText.length : 0)
						+ " head=" + (req && req.responseText ? req.responseText.slice(0, 80).replace(/\n/g, " ") : ""));
					xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
						"textLayer error doc=" + root.document.id + " page=" + root.page + " error=" + e);
					xochitlTranslateTextLayerPage = null;
					return null;
				}
			}

		function xochitlTranslateRectWidth(rect) {
			return rect.w !== undefined ? rect.w : rect.width;
		}

		function xochitlTranslateRectHeight(rect) {
			return rect.h !== undefined ? rect.h : rect.height;
		}

		function xochitlTranslatePaddedRect(rect, source) {
			var strokeSource = source === "fallback-rect" || source === "stroke-rect";
			var xPad = strokeSource ? 3 : 1.5;
			var yPad = strokeSource ? 8 : 3;
			return Qt.rect(rect.x - xPad, rect.y - yPad,
				xochitlTranslateRectWidth(rect) + xPad * 2,
				xochitlTranslateRectHeight(rect) + yPad * 2);
		}

		function xochitlTranslateIntersectionArea(a, b) {
			var left = Math.max(a.x, b.x);
			var top = Math.max(a.y, b.y);
			var right = Math.min(a.x + xochitlTranslateRectWidth(a), b.x + xochitlTranslateRectWidth(b));
			var bottom = Math.min(a.y + xochitlTranslateRectHeight(a), b.y + xochitlTranslateRectHeight(b));
			if (right <= left || bottom <= top) {
				return 0;
			}
			return (right - left) * (bottom - top);
		}

		function xochitlTranslateContentRect(pageData) {
			try {
				if (root.controller && root.controller.primaryContentRect
						&& root.controller.primaryContentRect.width > 0
						&& root.controller.primaryContentRect.height > 0) {
					return root.controller.primaryContentRect;
				}
			} catch (e) {
			}
			return Qt.rect(0, 0, pageData.width, pageData.height);
		}

		function xochitlTranslateToSceneArea(area, pageData, contentRect) {
			var sx = contentRect.width / pageData.width;
			var sy = contentRect.height / pageData.height;
			return Qt.rect(contentRect.x + area.x * sx,
				contentRect.y + area.y * sy,
				xochitlTranslateRectWidth(area) * sx,
				xochitlTranslateRectHeight(area) * sy);
		}

		function xochitlTranslateDescribeRects(rects, limit) {
			var text = "";
			if (!rects) {
				return "none";
			}
			var count = Math.min(rects.length || 0, limit);
			for (var i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
				if (i > 0) {
					text += ";";
				}
				text += rects[i];
			}
			return "count=" + (rects.length || 0) + " first=" + text;
		}

			function xochitlTranslateSelectSentenceFromRects(hitAreas, source) {
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sentence-try",
					"source=" + source + " hitAreas=" + xochitlTranslateDescribeRects(hitAreas, 4));
				var pageData = xochitlTranslateLoadTextLayerPage();
				if (!pageData || !pageData.sentences) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sentence-no-layer",
						"source=" + source + " pageData=" + pageData);
					return false;
				}
				if (!hitAreas || hitAreas.length === 0) {
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sentence-no-hitareas", "source=" + source);
					return false;
				}

			var contentRect = xochitlTranslateContentRect(pageData);
			var paddedHitAreas = [];
			for (var h = 0; h < hitAreas.length; ++h) {
				paddedHitAreas.push(xochitlTranslatePaddedRect(hitAreas[h], source));
			}
			var strokeSource = source === "fallback-rect" || source === "stroke-rect";
			var candidates = [];
			var directCandidates = [];
			var maxScore = 0;
			var maxDirectScore = 0;

			for (var i = 0; i < pageData.sentences.length; ++i) {
				var sentence = pageData.sentences[i];
				if (sentence.bbox) {
					var sentenceBounds = xochitlTranslateToSceneArea(sentence.bbox, pageData, contentRect);
					var boundsHit = false;
					for (var boundsIndex = 0; boundsIndex < paddedHitAreas.length; ++boundsIndex) {
						if (xochitlTranslateIntersectionArea(sentenceBounds, paddedHitAreas[boundsIndex]) > 0) {
							boundsHit = true;
							break;
						}
					}
					if (!boundsHit) {
						continue;
					}
				}
				var score = 0;
				var directScore = 0;
				for (var j = 0; sentence.areas && j < sentence.areas.length; ++j) {
					var sentenceArea = xochitlTranslateToSceneArea(sentence.areas[j], pageData, contentRect);
					for (var directIndex = 0; directIndex < hitAreas.length; ++directIndex) {
						directScore += xochitlTranslateIntersectionArea(sentenceArea, hitAreas[directIndex]);
					}
					for (var paddedIndex = 0; paddedIndex < paddedHitAreas.length; ++paddedIndex) {
						score += xochitlTranslateIntersectionArea(sentenceArea, paddedHitAreas[paddedIndex]);
					}
				}
				if (score > 0 || directScore > 0) {
					var candidate = { sentence: sentence, score: score, directScore: directScore };
					if (score > 0) {
						candidates.push(candidate);
					}
					if (directScore > 0) {
						directCandidates.push(candidate);
						maxDirectScore = Math.max(maxDirectScore, directScore);
					}
					maxScore = Math.max(maxScore, score);
				}
			}

			var selectedAreas = [];
			var selectedText = [];
			var hitSentences = 0;
			var minScore = maxScore * 0.45;
			var selectedCandidates = [];
			var selectionMode = "multi";
			if (strokeSource) {
				var sourceCandidates = directCandidates.length > 0 ? directCandidates : candidates;
				var bestCandidate = null;
				var bestScore = -1;
				selectionMode = directCandidates.length > 0 ? "direct-single" : "padded-single";
				minScore = directCandidates.length > 0 ? maxDirectScore : maxScore;
				for (var bestIndex = 0; bestIndex < sourceCandidates.length; ++bestIndex) {
					var candidateScore = directCandidates.length > 0
						? sourceCandidates[bestIndex].directScore
						: sourceCandidates[bestIndex].score;
					if (candidateScore > bestScore) {
						bestScore = candidateScore;
						bestCandidate = sourceCandidates[bestIndex];
					}
				}
				if (bestCandidate) {
					selectedCandidates.push(bestCandidate);
				}
			} else {
				for (var c = 0; c < candidates.length; ++c) {
					if (candidates[c].score < minScore) {
						continue;
					}
					selectedCandidates.push(candidates[c]);
				}
			}
			for (var selectedIndex = 0; selectedIndex < selectedCandidates.length; ++selectedIndex) {
				++hitSentences;
				var selectedSentence = selectedCandidates[selectedIndex].sentence;
				if (selectedSentence.text) {
					selectedText.push(selectedSentence.text);
				}
				for (var k = 0; selectedSentence.areas && k < selectedSentence.areas.length; ++k) {
					selectedAreas.push(xochitlTranslateToSceneArea(selectedSentence.areas[k], pageData, contentRect));
				}
			}

				if (!hitSentences || selectedAreas.length === 0) {
					xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
						"sentence miss doc=" + root.document.id + " page=" + root.page
						+ " source=" + source + " hitAreas=" + xochitlTranslateDescribeRects(hitAreas, 4)
						+ " contentRect=" + contentRect
						+ " mode=" + selectionMode
						+ " maxScore=" + maxScore + " maxDirectScore=" + maxDirectScore);
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sentence-miss",
						"source=" + source
						+ " mode=" + selectionMode
						+ " hitAreas=" + xochitlTranslateDescribeRects(hitAreas, 4)
						+ " contentRect=" + contentRect
						+ " maxScore=" + maxScore
						+ " maxDirectScore=" + maxDirectScore);
					return false;
				}

			var text = selectedText.join(" ").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
			try {
				glyphSelectionRoot.active = true;
				root.glyphSelection.setSelection(selectedAreas, text);
				strokeHandler.setSelectionActive(true);
				root.glyphSelection.open();
				xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect();
					xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
						"sentence hit doc=" + root.document.id + " page=" + root.page
						+ " source=" + source
					+ " hits=" + hitSentences + " areas=" + selectedAreas.length
					+ " mode=" + selectionMode
					+ " maxScore=" + maxScore + " minScore=" + minScore
					+ " maxDirectScore=" + maxDirectScore
						+ " contentRect=" + contentRect
						+ " hitAreas=" + xochitlTranslateDescribeRects(hitAreas, 4)
						+ " text=" + text.slice(0, 220));
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sentence-hit",
						"source=" + source
						+ " hits=" + hitSentences
						+ " areas=" + selectedAreas.length
						+ " mode=" + selectionMode
						+ " textLen=" + text.length
						+ " text=" + text.slice(0, 120));
					return true;
				} catch (e) {
					xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
						"sentence select error=" + e + " areas=" + selectedAreas.length);
					xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("sentence-select-error",
						"source=" + source + " error=" + e + " areas=" + selectedAreas.length);
					return false;
				}
			}

			function xochitlTranslateSelectText() {
				var status = "text-select:";
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("select-text-start", "");
				try {
					endItemSelection();
				status += " endItemSelection";
			} catch (e1) {
				status += " no-endItemSelection(" + e1 + ")";
			}
			try {
				endGlyphSelection();
				status += " endGlyphSelection";
			} catch (e2) {
				status += " no-endGlyphSelection(" + e2 + ")";
			}
			try {
				textSelectionMenu.close();
				status += " closeTextSelectionMenu";
			} catch (e3) {
				status += " no-closeTextSelectionMenu(" + e3 + ")";
			}
			try {
				xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect();
				xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode = true;
				status += " glyphSelectMode";
			} catch (e4) {
				status += " no-glyphSelectMode(" + e4 + ")";
			}
			try {
				forceActiveFocus();
				status += " forceActiveFocus";
			} catch (e5) {
				status += " no-forceActiveFocus(" + e5 + ")";
			}

				var req = new XMLHttpRequest();
				req.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-debug.txt");
				req.send(status);
				xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("select-text-done", status);
			}

		Rectangle {
			id: xochitlTranslatePopupDismissLayer
			visible: root.xochitlTranslatePopupVisible
			z: 9999
			anchors.fill: parent
			color: "transparent"

			MouseArea {
				anchors.fill: parent
				onClicked: root.xochitlTranslateClosePopup()
			}
		}

		Rectangle {
			id: xochitlTranslatePopup
			visible: root.xochitlTranslatePopupVisible
			z: 10000
			color: "white"
				border.color: "black"
				border.width: 2
				property real xochitlTranslatePopupTop: Math.max(24,
					(parent.height - Math.min(parent.height - 48, Math.max(560, parent.height * 0.72))) / 2)
				width: Math.min(parent.width - 24, Math.max(480, parent.width * 0.78))
				height: Math.min(parent.height - xochitlTranslatePopupTop - 24,
					Math.max(460, parent.height * 0.52))
				anchors.horizontalCenter: parent.horizontalCenter
				y: xochitlTranslatePopupTop

			MouseArea {
				anchors.fill: parent
			}

			Text {
				id: xochitlTranslatePopupTitle
				text: root.xochitlTranslateActiveBackend === "local" ? "Translate - Local" : "Translate - AI"
				font.pointSize: 24
				font.bold: true
				color: "black"
				anchors.left: parent.left
				anchors.leftMargin: 24
				anchors.top: parent.top
				anchors.topMargin: 20
			}

			Rectangle {
				id: xochitlTranslatePopupClose
				width: 58
				height: 46
				anchors.right: parent.right
				anchors.rightMargin: 18
				anchors.top: parent.top
				anchors.topMargin: 14
				color: "white"
				border.color: "black"
				border.width: 1

				Text {
					anchors.centerIn: parent
					text: "X"
					font.pointSize: 20
					font.bold: true
					color: "black"
				}

				MouseArea {
					anchors.fill: parent
					onClicked: root.xochitlTranslateClosePopup()
				}
			}

			Text {
				id: xochitlTranslatePopupStatus
				text: root.xochitlTranslateStatusText
				visible: text.length > 0
				color: "black"
				font.pointSize: 17
				wrapMode: Text.WordWrap
				anchors.left: parent.left
				anchors.right: xochitlTranslatePopupClose.left
				anchors.leftMargin: 24
				anchors.rightMargin: 14
				anchors.top: xochitlTranslatePopupTitle.bottom
				anchors.topMargin: 8
			}

			Flickable {
				id: xochitlTranslatePopupFlick
				clip: true
				anchors.left: parent.left
				anchors.right: parent.right
				anchors.top: xochitlTranslatePopupStatus.visible ? xochitlTranslatePopupStatus.bottom : xochitlTranslatePopupTitle.bottom
				anchors.bottom: xochitlTranslateQuestionPanel.top
				anchors.leftMargin: 24
				anchors.rightMargin: 24
				anchors.topMargin: 18
				anchors.bottomMargin: 14
				contentWidth: width
				contentHeight: xochitlTranslatePopupContent.height

				Column {
					id: xochitlTranslatePopupContent
					width: xochitlTranslatePopupFlick.width
					spacing: 16

						Text {
							text: "Original"
							visible: root.xochitlTranslateShowOriginalText
							width: parent.width
							font.pointSize: 18
							font.bold: true
							color: "black"
						}

						Text {
							text: root.xochitlTranslateOriginalText
							visible: root.xochitlTranslateShowOriginalText
							width: parent.width
							font.pointSize: 18
							color: "black"
							wrapMode: Text.WordWrap
						}

					Text {
						text: "Answer"
						width: parent.width
						font.pointSize: 18
						font.bold: true
						color: "black"
					}

					Text {
							text: root.xochitlTranslateTranslatedText
							width: parent.width
							font.family: root.xochitlTranslateCjkFont
							font.pointSize: 21
							color: "black"
							wrapMode: Text.WordWrap
						}
				}
			}

			Rectangle {
				id: xochitlTranslateQuestionPanel
				anchors.left: parent.left
				anchors.right: parent.right
				anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
				anchors.leftMargin: 24
				anchors.rightMargin: 24
				anchors.bottomMargin: 20
				height: 82
				color: "white"
				border.color: "black"
				border.width: 1
				visible: root.xochitlTranslateActiveBackend === "ai"

				TextEdit {
					id: xochitlTranslateQuestionInput
					text: root.xochitlTranslateFollowupText
					anchors.left: parent.left
					anchors.right: xochitlTranslateQuestionSend.left
					anchors.top: parent.top
					anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
					anchors.leftMargin: 12
					anchors.rightMargin: 12
					anchors.topMargin: 8
					anchors.bottomMargin: 8
					wrapMode: TextEdit.WrapAtWordBoundaryOrAnywhere
					font.pointSize: 18
					color: "black"
					focus: false
					inputMethodHints: Qt.ImhNoAutoUppercase | Qt.ImhMultiLine
					KeyboardSettings.actionPanelEnabled: true
					onTextChanged: root.xochitlTranslateFollowupText = text
					onActiveFocusChanged: {
						if (activeFocus) {
							Qt.inputMethod.show();
						}
					}
					cursorDelegate: Rectangle {
						width: 2
						height: xochitlTranslateQuestionInput.font.pixelSize
						color: "black"
						visible: parent.activeFocus
					}
				}

				Rectangle {
					id: xochitlTranslateQuestionSend
					width: 96
					height: parent.height
					anchors.right: parent.right
					anchors.top: parent.top
					color: (root.xochitlTranslateBusy && root.xochitlTranslateActiveBackend !== "ai") ? "#eeeeee" : "white"
					border.color: "black"
					border.width: 1

					Text {
						anchors.centerIn: parent
						text: "Ask"
						font.pointSize: 18
						font.bold: true
						color: "black"
					}

					MouseArea {
						anchors.fill: parent
						enabled: root.xochitlTranslateActiveBackend === "ai" && !root.xochitlTranslateBusy
						onClicked: root.xochitlTranslateSubmitFollowup()
					}
				}

				MouseArea {
					anchors.left: parent.left
					anchors.right: xochitlTranslateQuestionSend.left
					anchors.top: parent.top
					anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
					onClicked: {
						xochitlTranslateQuestionInput.forceActiveFocus();
						Qt.inputMethod.show();
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#glyphSelection
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			xochitlTranslateTextFn: root.xochitlTranslateText
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#textSelectionMenu
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			xochitlTranslateTextFn: root.xochitlTranslateText
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#hwcSelectionTool
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			xochitlTranslateTextFn: root.xochitlTranslateText
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE FocusScope > [[17327575798530333160]]#[[11510301049521437407]]
	REBUILD onStrokeCompleted
		LOCATE AFTER STREAM / completedStroke(); /
		INSERT {
				try {
					var strokeDebugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
					var strokeBounds = stroke.boundingRect;
						strokeDebugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-stroke-debug.txt");
						strokeDebugReq.send("strokeCompleted translateMode=" + root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode
					+ " selection=" + stroke.isSelectionTool
					+ " points=" + stroke.pointCount
						+ " bounds=" + strokeBounds
						+ " lineTool=" + strokeHandler.lineTool);
						root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("stroke-completed",
							"selection=" + stroke.isSelectionTool
							+ " points=" + stroke.pointCount
							+ " bounds=" + strokeBounds
							+ " lineTool=" + strokeHandler.lineTool);
				} catch (strokeDebugError) {
				}
					if (root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode && stroke.isSelectionTool) {
						if (stroke.pointCount === 0) {
							root.xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect();
							endItemSelection();
							return;
						}
					inputSurface.clearFramebuffer();
					try {
						root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRect = stroke.boundingRect;
						root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRectValid = true;
						root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokeDocumentId = root.document ? root.document.id : "";
						root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokePage = root.page;
					var convertDebugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
						convertDebugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-stroke-debug.txt");
						convertDebugReq.send("strokeCompleted translateMode=" + root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode
							+ " selection=" + stroke.isSelectionTool
							+ " selectSource=selection-stroke"
						+ " points=" + stroke.pointCount
						+ " bounds=" + stroke.boundingRect
						+ " lineTool=" + strokeHandler.lineTool);
						controller.selectWithLine(stroke, SceneController.IgnoreTapGesture);
						root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("select-with-line-called",
							"bounds=" + stroke.boundingRect + " points=" + stroke.pointCount);
					} catch (selectError) {
						var selectDebugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
						selectDebugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-stroke-debug.txt");
						selectDebugReq.send("selectWithLine error=" + selectError);
						root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("select-with-line-error", "error=" + selectError);
					}
					Qt.callLater(inputSurface.clearFramebuffer);
					viewport.requestRepaintDirty();
					root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("stroke-handler-return", "");
					return;
				}
		}
	END REBUILD
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[18399528329672988301]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		onTranslateSelection: function(backend) {
			~&6504254477&~.~&7282468819357443632&~(function () {
				~&11077763042784530127&~.xochitlTranslateFrom(~&8399340108982949229&~.~&5308518110917893541&~(~&8399340108982949229&~.~&15752433948179392809&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&15777890623490054006&~), backend);
				~&6504254477&~.~&12148339614529610933&~();
			});
		}
	}
		END TRAVERSE
		TRAVERSE FocusScope > Connections[.target=root.controller]
		REBUILD onAreaSelected
			LOCATE BEFORE { const stillSelecting = strokeHandler.lineTool == Line.SelectionTool; }
			REPLACE LOCATED WITH {
				const stillSelecting = strokeHandler.lineTool == Line.SelectionTool || root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode;
			}
			LOCATE AFTER { const stillSelecting = strokeHandler.lineTool == Line.SelectionTool || root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode; }
			INSERT {
					try {
						var areaDebugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
						areaDebugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-area-debug.txt");
						areaDebugReq.send("areaSelected validSelection=" + validSelection
							+ " validGlyphSelection=" + validGlyphSelection
							+ " stillSelecting=" + stillSelecting
							+ " translateMode=" + root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode
							+ " sceneRect=" + sceneRect);
						root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("area-selected",
							"validSelection=" + validSelection
							+ " validGlyphSelection=" + validGlyphSelection
							+ " stillSelecting=" + stillSelecting
							+ " sceneRect=" + sceneRect);
					} catch (areaDebugError) {
					}
			}
			LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / if ((validSelection || validGlyphSelection) && stillSelecting) { /
				INSERT {
					try {
						if (!(validSelection || validGlyphSelection) && root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode) {
							if (root.xochitlTranslateHasCurrentStrokeRect()
									&& root.xochitlTranslateSelectSentenceFromRects([root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRect], "fallback-rect")) {
								root.xochitlTranslateResetLastStrokeRect();
								return;
							}
							root.xochitlTranslateStartSelectionFailTimer("invalid-area");
							return;
						}
					} catch (sentenceFallbackError) {
						root.xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
							"sentence fallback error=" + sentenceFallbackError);
				}
			}
		END REBUILD
		REBUILD onGlyphsSelected
				LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / glyphSelectionRoot.active = true; /
					INSERT {
							try {
								root.xochitlTranslateCancelSelectionFailTimer("glyphs-selected");
								root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("glyphs-selected-before-open",
									"lastStroke=" + root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRect);
								if (root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode
									&& root.xochitlTranslateHasCurrentStrokeRect()
									&& root.xochitlTranslateSelectSentenceFromRects([root.xochitlTranslateLastStrokeRect], "stroke-rect")) {
								return;
						}
				} catch (sentenceGlyphError) {
					root.xochitlTranslateDebug("file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-sentence-debug.txt",
						"sentence glyph error=" + sentenceGlyphError);
				}
			}
			LOCATE AFTER STREAM / root.glyphSelection.setSelection(areas, text); /
			INSERT {
					try {
						var glyphDebugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
						var glyphPreview = (text || "").replace(/\n/g, " ").slice(0, 180);
						glyphDebugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-glyph-debug.txt");
						var glyphRect = root.glyphSelection.selectionBoundingRect;
					glyphDebugReq.send("glyphsSelected len=" + (text ? text.length : 0)
						+ " rect=" + glyphRect
						+ " stillSelecting=" + (strokeHandler.lineTool == Line.SelectionTool)
							+ " translateMode=" + root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode
							+ " text=" + glyphPreview);
						root.xochitlTranslateTraceSelection("glyphs-selected",
							"len=" + (text ? text.length : 0)
							+ " rect=" + glyphRect
							+ " stillSelecting=" + (strokeHandler.lineTool == Line.SelectionTool)
							+ " text=" + glyphPreview);
					} catch (glyphDebugError) {
					}
				if (root.glyphSelection
						&& !root.glyphSelection.selectionBoundingRect.isEmpty
						&& (strokeHandler.lineTool == Line.SelectionTool || root.xochitlTranslateGlyphSelectMode)) {
					strokeHandler.setSelectionActive(true);
					root.glyphSelection.open();
				}
			}
		END REBUILD
			END TRAVERSE
		END AFFECT

AFFECT [[15977735761668523171]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
	LOCATE BEFORE ALL
	REBUILD [[8399947697665748998]]
	LOCATE BEFORE ALL
	INSERT { !xochitlTranslatingSelection && }
	END REBUILD
	LOCATE BEFORE [[233724020120234]]
		INSERT {
		property var xochitlTranslateTextFn: null
		property ~&6503679477&~ xochitlTranslatingSelection: ~&214625660372&~
		property string xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend: ""
		function xochitlTranslateWriteText(text, backend) {
			var cleanText = (text || "").replace(/\n/g, " ").trim();
			if (xochitlTranslateTextFn) {
				xochitlTranslateTextFn(cleanText, backend || xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend);
				return;
			}
			var debugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
			debugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-command-debug.txt");
			debugReq.send("central translate callback missing");
		}
		function xochitlTranslateFrom(~&214629893131&~, backend) {
			xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend = backend || "";
			xochitlTranslatingSelection = ~&6504329801&~;
			~&8398536573969953217&~.~&15319355904852707254&~(~&214629893131&~, ~&7712198086779994&~.~&5671208228825160146&~);
		}

	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[742117811095419965]]
	REBUILD [[12940955005542131354]]
	LOCATE AFTER STREAM / { /
	INSERT {
	~&5972376&~(xochitlTranslatingSelection) {
		~&5972376&~(!~&7713012755563699&~) {
			~&7083121450889&~;
		}
		xochitlTranslateWriteText(~&3875029581909304837&~.plainText, xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend);
		xochitlTranslatingSelection = ~&214625660372&~;
		root.close();
		~&7083121450889&~;
	}
	}
	END REBUILD
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[2170432337220872387]]
	TRAVERSE ?#root
	LOCATE AFTER selectedText
	INSERT {
		property var xochitlTranslateTextFn: null
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233132260]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		property bool xochitlTranslateBackendMenuVisible: false
		function xochitlTranslateWriteText(text, backend) {
			var cleanText = (text || "").replace(/\n/g, " ").trim();
			if (root.xochitlTranslateTextFn) {
				root.xochitlTranslateTextFn(cleanText, backend);
				return;
			}
			var debugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
			debugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-command-debug.txt");
			debugReq.send("central translate callback missing");
		}
		~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
			~&5972374&~: glyphSelectionTranslate
			~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
			~&6504337259&~: ~&10742505294233132260&~.~&6504337259&~
			~&6504315758&~: "Translate"
			~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/icons/sparkles.svg"
			~&254542236275632405&~: {
				~&10742505294233132260&~.xochitlTranslateWriteText(~&16536305558369206583&~);
				~&10742505294233132260&~.xochitlTranslateBackendMenuVisible = false;
				root.close();
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[3708437855669237819]]
	TRAVERSE ?#root
	LOCATE AFTER availableSceneRect
	INSERT {
		property var xochitlTranslateTextFn: null
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[738928733275563153]] > [[12395602925408354507]]
	LOCATE AFTER [[16513464771895549213]]#[[496330270324752866]]
	INSERT {
		visible: !xochitlTranslatingSelection
		property ~&197102514&~ xochitlTranslateClipboard: ~&254550717068498203&~
		property ~&6503679477&~ xochitlTranslatingSelection: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&6503679477&~ xochitlTranslateBackendMenuVisible: ~&214625660372&~
		property string xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend: ""
		function xochitlTranslateWriteText(text, backend) {
			var cleanText = (text || "").replace(/\n/g, " ").trim();
			if (root.xochitlTranslateTextFn) {
				root.xochitlTranslateTextFn(cleanText, backend || xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend);
				return;
			}
			var debugReq = new XMLHttpRequest();
			debugReq.open("PUT", "file:///tmp/xochitl-translate-command-debug.txt");
			debugReq.send("central translate callback missing");
		}
		function xochitlTranslateStartSelection(backend) {
			xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend = backend || "";
			xochitlTranslateClipboard = ~&254480318283987577&~.~&6504315758&~;
			xochitlTranslatingSelection = ~&6504329801&~;
			xochitlTranslateBackendMenuVisible = ~&214625660372&~;
			~&8399340108982949229&~.~&10756366413375378098&~();
		}

		~&16513464771895549213&~ {
			~&5972374&~: translateSelectionButton
			~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/icons/sparkles.svg"
			~&6504315758&~: "Translate"
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&8399340108982949229&~.~&15974515710717949451&~
			~&7713561545874130&~: ~&214625660372&~
			~&254542236275632405&~: xochitlTranslateStartSelection()
		}
		~&428051690305612204&~ {
			~&7083194890448&~: ~&8399340108982949229&~

			function ~&16346808361226786719&~() {
				~&5972376&~(!xochitlTranslatingSelection) ~&7083121450889&~;

				xochitlTranslateWriteText(~&254480318283987577&~.textString(), xochitlTranslateSelectedBackend);

				~&254480318283987577&~.~&6504315758&~ = xochitlTranslateClipboard;
				xochitlTranslateClipboard = ~&254550717068498203&~;
				xochitlTranslatingSelection = ~&214625660372&~;
				root.close();
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
